Ivory Imbued Collar  
 

Lore Item
Slot: NECK
AC: 8
WIS: +5 MANA: +10
SV FIRE: +2 SV DISEASE: +10 SV COLD: +2 SV MAGIC: +2 SV POISON: +10
WT: 3.5 Size: SMALL
Class: SHM
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

a Di`Zok Captain
a Di`zok Researcher

a massive construct
a revived sarnak
a spectral betrayer

Ivory Imbued Collar

# Jul 29 2003 at 2:06 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592256468217
77 posts
Picked this up last night. Was working the exit ramp when I saw Watch Sargeant Riz'oul on the rampart. Snared him up the ramp, then easy job to Root and DoT. Tried to snare the Sargeant again when he respawned but he got stuck on the rampart.

Kedaian
58 Druid
▲ Page top
Imbued ivory collar
QuoteReply
# Jan 03 2002 at 4:33 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252237188
15 posts
I just bought one of these on the Nameless server for 2000pp. It is for my level 40 Shammy. I had been looking for a Black Alloy Medallian when a guy sent me a tell saying he had something better. I am glad I got it.
▲ Page top
WOW, Im one luck SoB
QuoteReply
# Dec 14 2001 at 3:04 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250419454
56 posts
Some gnome sold this to me this evening for 270pp!

He's gonna kill himself by the tribunal when he realized it's worth this much.
▲ Page top
Nice Collar Indeed
QuoteReply
# Nov 28 2001 at 10:27 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591757889512
Sage
72 posts
These collars are kind of rare, but if you stay in Chardok long enough to make a few levels, you will eventually see one. If you don't intend to spend a lot of time in Chardok, then just go ahead and buy one if you can find it for sale. I don't think I have ever seen one for sale in East Commons.

I used to horde money and insist on getting stuff myself instead of buying it. Now I am level 54 and with the exception of outrageously high-priced items, there is NOTHING I can spend my money on that is better than what I already have hehe. I wish I had spent some of that money as I was levelling. I would probably be a couple of levels higher if I had been going after XP instead of trying to find equipment upgrades on my own.
▲ Page top
RE: Nice Collar Indeed
QuoteReply
# May 22 2002 at 10:04 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591774313808
View User Forum
11 posts
I dont know if this is that rare, went in Chardok for the first time today and looted it after 1 hour.
